toolbox_description: A collection of efficient, modern tools designed to enhance your productivity.
douyin_tool_description: Efficient Douyin video download and analysis tool.
speech_to_text_description: High-performance local speech recognition based on OpenAI Whisper.
object_detection_description: Local real-time object detection based on RF-DETR, supporting camera and images.
live_photo_tool_description: Parse Apple Live Photos (HEIF/HEIC) and extract static images and videos.
github_rank_tool_description: Top 100 GitHub repositories ranked by stars, commits, or contributors.
github_rank_subtitle: Default view shows global top 100 repositories by stars; you can re-rank by commits or contributors.
github_rank_owner_placeholder: Enter a GitHub user or org
github_rank_empty: No repositories found in the current ranking.
github_rank_error: Failed to load GitHub repository data.
